mechanics.name: Drive Impact
mechanics.description: A powerful forward strike that absorbs up to two incoming hits. Costs 1 Drive bar.

mechanics.name: Drive Parry
mechanics.description: Automatically repels incoming attacks. Slowly drains Drive gauge while held. A Perfect Parry occurs if tapped right before the attack hits.

mechanics.name: Drive Rush
mechanics.input: Dash out of Parry OR Dash out of cancellable normal
mechanics.description: A rapid dash forward. Costs 1 bar from parry, or 3 bars when cancelled from a normal attack.

mechanics.name: Overdrive (OD) Arts
mechanics.description: Enhanced versions of Special Moves. Formerly known as EX moves. Costs 2 Drive bars.

modes.name: World Tour
modes.description: Single-player story mode where you create an avatar and learn from masters.

modes.name: Battle Hub
modes.description: Online lobby system styled as an arcade. Play casual matches, extreme battles, or retro games.

modes.name: Fighting Ground
modes.description: Traditional modes including Arcade, Training, Ranked Match, and Combo Trials.

faqs.question: What happens when my Drive Gauge is empty?
faqs.answer: You enter 'Burnout'. You take chip damage when blocking, suffer 4 additional frames of blockstun, and cannot use any Drive mechanics.

faqs.question: What is the difference between Modern and Classic controls?
faqs.answer: Modern controls simplify special move inputs to a single button and direction, but deal 20% less damage on those simplified specials and lock you out of some normal attacks. Classic requires traditional motion inputs but gives full access to the character's kit at 100% damage.
